creator: cheunghonyu@gmail.com
text:
The following is poudriere log

=======================<phase: fetch        >==========================
===>   firefox-21.0,1 depends on file: /usr/local/sbin/pkg - found
=> firefox-21.0.source.tar.bz2 doesn't seem to exist in /usr/ports/distfiles/.
=> Attempting to fetch https://ftp.mozilla.org/pub/mozilla.org/firefox/releases/21.0/source/firefox-21.0.source.tar.bz2
firefox-21.0.source.tar.bz2                            100 MB  177 kBps
===> Fetching all distfiles required by firefox-21.0,1 for building
=======================================================================
=======================<phase: checksum     >==========================
===>   firefox-21.0,1 depends on file: /usr/local/sbin/pkg - found
===> Fetching all distfiles required by firefox-21.0,1 for building
=> SHA256 Checksum OK for firefox-21.0.source.tar.bz2.
=======================================================================
=======================<phase: extract      >==========================
===>   firefox-21.0,1 depends on file: /usr/local/sbin/pkg - found
===> Fetching all distfiles required by firefox-21.0,1 for building
===>  Extracting for firefox-21.0,1
=> SHA256 Checksum OK for firefox-21.0.source.tar.bz2.
=======================================================================
=======================<phase: patch        >==========================
===>  Patching for firefox-21.0,1
===>   Converting DOS text file to UNIX text file: 
===>  Applying FreeBSD patches for firefox-21.0,1
Syntax error: redirection unexpected
*** [gecko-post-patch] Error code 2

Stop in /usr/ports/www/firefox.

How-To-Repeat: Updating ports source after 16 May 2013, www/firefox fails to build in patch phrase.
